name: Brick Breaker Premium
short_description: The classic brick-breaker game is back! 35 challenging levels to complete with that classic brick breaker feel, heroic storyline, and classic power-ups. Unlock the ending cutscenes—if you’ve got the skill to make it that far.
detailed_description:
The Classic Brick Breaker Game!

Classic brick breaker action with familiar feel.

You play as Blippy, the heroic paddle standing between Earth and its greatest threat, The Evil Snarfer. The Evil Snarfer is closing in, and every cleared stage brings you closer to the truth of where it all began. Break the bricks, keep the ball in play, and use classic power-ups to turn the tide.

Finish the full 35-level challenge and you’ll unlock the ending cutscenes—if you’ve got the skill to make it that far.

Features

  • 35 challenging levels to complete

  • Play as Blippy, the heroic paddle

  • Heroic origin storyline: where it all began

  • Classic brick breaker action with familiar feel

  • Classic power-ups to help you push through tougher stages

  • Face off against The Evil Snarfer as you fight to save Earth

  • Unlock ending cutscenes by completing the game

  • Gamepad Support
